texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sealed Quotations are invitedby theundersignedfrom experiencedsuppliers/dealers for supply of several chemicals &consumables to Women'sPolytechnic,Hapania,Tripura.The detailed listof these chemicals & consumables are available in Annexure-I.Following instructions should befollowedfor submittingsealed quotations.
texts.text: Sealed Quotations are invitedby theundersignedfrom experiencedsuppliers/dealers for supply of several chemicals &consumables to Women'sPolytechnic,Hapania,Tripura.The detailed listof these chemicals & consumables are available in Annexure-I.Following instructions should befollowedfor submittingsealed quotations.
